metadata.name: Conduct Due Diligence for Commercial Purchase

description: A client is under contract to buy a small apartment building. The agent must manage the due diligence process.

nodes.task_description: Create a due diligence checklist including items like reviewing all leases, service contracts, and financial statements.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a comprehensive checklist for the transaction.

nodes.task_description: Request all necessary documents from the seller's agent.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends a formal request for all checklist items.

nodes.task_description: Track the received documents and follow up on outstanding items before the due diligence period expires.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent maintains an organized tracking system and ensures all documents are received on time.
